{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Valin's forehead symbol
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An oval of purple light with a single dot in the middle flared on [[Valin]]'s forehead.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
